---
title: "Posts"
author: ""
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  fields: [title, description, categories, image]
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
code-tools: false
comments: false
date-modified: ""
---
